message:
refactor(analysis): adapt all analysis modules to typed DateTime<Utc> timestamps

Update every analysis module to consume the new Option<DateTime<Utc>>
fields directly instead of parsing from Option<String>.

Key changes per module:

- alerts.rs: Replace parse_timestamp(issue.updated_at.as_deref()) chains
  with direct field access (issue.updated_at.or(issue.created_at)). Remove
  unnecessary .clone() on Copy-type DateTime values in tests.

- diff.rs: Replace timestamp_or_zero(issue.X.as_deref()) with a new
  dt_or_zero(Option<DateTime<Utc>>) helper that formats to RFC 3339 only
  at the serialization boundary. Removes the old string-based
  timestamp_or_zero function entirely.

- forecast.rs: Simplify velocity computation by replacing the
  closed_at.as_deref().and_then(parse_rfc3339_utc).or_else(...) chain
  with issue.closed_at.or(issue.updated_at). Test fixtures now use
  DateTime arithmetic directly.

- history.rs: Change HistoryEvent.timestamp from Option<String> to
  Option<DateTime<Utc>>. Remove the module-local parse_ts helper. Sort
  events by native DateTime comparison. Tests use ts() helper.

- label_intel.rs: Remove all .as_deref().and_then(parse_datetime) chains
  in velocity, freshness, and attention computations. Tests use ts().

- search.rs: Rewrite normalize_recency to accept Option<DateTime<Utc>>
  directly, eliminating the parse_timestamp_ms_pub indirection and manual
  millisecond arithmetic. Uses chrono .num_days() instead.

- suggest.rs: Simplify stale-issue detection and dependency-direction
  heuristic by accessing timestamps directly. Tests use DateTime values.

- triage.rs: Remove .as_ref().and_then(parse_from_rfc3339) from staleness
  computation — just call .map(|dt| dt.timestamp()). Reformat several
  long compute_impact_score call sites for line-length compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -418,9 +418,9 @@ fn to_diff_issue(issue: &Issue) -> DiffIssue {
         priority: issue.priority,
         issue_type: issue.issue_type.clone(),
         assignee: non_empty(&issue.assignee),
-        created_at: timestamp_or_zero(issue.created_at.as_deref()),
-        updated_at: timestamp_or_zero(issue.updated_at.as_deref()),
-        closed_at: issue.closed_at.as_deref().and_then(non_empty),
+        created_at: dt_or_zero(issue.created_at),
+        updated_at: dt_or_zero(issue.updated_at),
+        closed_at: issue.closed_at.map(|dt| dt.to_rfc3339()),
         labels: issue.labels.clone(),
         dependencies: issue.dependencies.iter().map(to_diff_dependency).collect(),
         comments: issue.comments.iter().map(to_diff_comment).collect(),
@@ -433,7 +433,7 @@ fn to_diff_dependency(dep: &Dependency) -> DiffDependency {
         depends_on_id: dep.depends_on_id.clone(),
         dep_type: dep.dep_type.clone(),
         created_by: dep.created_by.clone(),
-        created_at: timestamp_or_zero(dep.created_at.as_deref()),
+        created_at: dt_or_zero(dep.created_at),
     }
 }
 
@@ -443,14 +443,12 @@ fn to_diff_comment(comment: &Comment) -> DiffComment {
         issue_id: comment.issue_id.clone(),
         author: comment.author.clone(),
         text: comment.text.clone(),
-        created_at: timestamp_or_zero(comment.created_at.as_deref()),
+        created_at: dt_or_zero(comment.created_at),
     }
 }
 
-fn timestamp_or_zero(raw: Option<&str>) -> String {
-    raw.filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
-        .unwrap_or(ZERO_TIME_RFC3339)
-        .to_string()
+fn dt_or_zero(dt: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>) -> String {
+    dt.map_or_else(|| ZERO_TIME_RFC3339.to_string(), |d| d.to_rfc3339())
 }
 
 fn non_empty(value: &str) -> Option<String> {
